a:r.a:t: The API Gateway — All 48 Public Endpoints
Main chat — OpenAI-compatible. Streams SSE. Model = enterprise-agent
Connector-mode chat endpoint for third-party integrations (non-SSE)
Upload files for RAG ingestion (multipart/form-data). Returns upload_id.
Batch-ingest document paths into knowledge base collection
Download workspace artifacts produced by agents
Poll status of background coordinator worker job
List available agents (OpenAI model list format)
List agent configs with modes, tools, and entry paths
List all indexed skill packs with status, scope, metadata
Get one skill pack by ID
Create / index a new skill pack
Roll back skill to previous version
Preview which skills would match a given query (no side effects)
List all indexed graph knowledge bases for the tenant
Get metadata and status for a specific graph index
Trigger GraphRAG indexing run on a document corpus
Import an existing graph (e.g. Neo4j export) into the system
Direct graph query — returns entities, relationships, context
Liveness probe — returns 200 if process is running
Readiness probe — checks KB indexed, providers up
api/main.py — 48 public endpoints. Highlighted rows = new graph, connector & agents endpoints. Admin endpoints in control_panel/routes.py.
